ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #1234567890 Confirmation
ham.body:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order #1234567890 has been confirmed and is now being processed.

Item Details:
- 1× Echo Dot (4th Gen) – $49.99
- 2× USB-C to USB-A Cable – $9.99 each

Estimated delivery: 3–5 business days.

You can view the order details and track your shipment by logging into your Amazon account.

If you have any questions, contact our customer support.

Happy shopping!

Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiration Notice
spam.body:
Dear [Customer Name],

Microsoft 365 has detected unusual activity associated with your account. As a security measure, your password will expire in 24 hours. To continue accessing your mailbox, please reset your password immediately by clicking the verification link below.

<URL>

Failure to update your password will result in temporary suspension of your account. This action is required to protect your data.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Microsoft Security Team
